phases.name: Dead Code Removal
phases.goal: Remove unused code, deprecated functions, and stale imports

steps: Remove line 50: '_matches_pattern = matches_pattern'

tasks.description: Remove dead LOG_PATHS and related functions from status_logs.py
steps: Remove LOG_PATHS dict (lines 23-39) - user services use journalctl not file logs
Remove ANSI_ESCAPE pattern (line 42) if only used by tail_log_file
Remove tail_log_file() function (lines 83-113)
Remove get_service_logs endpoint (lines 116-165) - deprecated by unified-logs
Run tests to verify no regressions

tasks.description: Remove unused state variable in AgentPanel.tsx
steps: Remove line 53: const [, setActiveProvider] = useState<LLMProvider>('claude')
Update useWebSocketConnection options to not require setActiveProvider
Remove lines 114-118 (commented 'refresh-portfolio-analytics' with ERA001 tags)
Remove discover_backend_endpoints method (lines 301-323)
Verify no API callers exist
Method is superseded by discover_all_openapi_endpoints

phases.name: DRY Violation Fixes - Utilities
phases.goal: Consolidate duplicate utility code into shared modules

tasks.description: Use existing generate_uuid() utility in watchlist.py
steps: Add import: from app.utils.db_helpers import generate_uuid
Replace str(uuid.uuid4()) with generate_uuid() at lines 96, 153, 264
Remove uuid import if no longer needed

tasks.description: Use existing utc_now_iso() utility in watchlist.py
steps: Add import: from app.utils.formatters import utc_now_iso
Replace datetime.now(UTC).isoformat() with utc_now_iso() at lines 265, 392
Import calculate_duration_ms from app.utils.formatters
Replace 3 instances of duration_ms = int(...total_seconds() * 1000) with calculate_duration_ms()
Locations: lines 192, 250, 287, 330
Import calculate_duration_ms from app.utils.formatters
Replace line 928 inline calculation with calculate_duration_ms(request_start, datetime.now(UTC))
Create frontend/lib/utils/dialog-helpers.ts
Export shouldShowDialog(storageKey: string, isLiveOperation: boolean): boolean
Update MaintenanceTable.tsx, UnifiedMaintenanceCard.tsx, MaintenanceCard.tsx, MaintenanceStatus.tsx, app/status/page.tsx to import shared utility
tasks.verification: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend

phases.name: DRY Violation Fixes - Constants
phases.goal: Extract magic numbers and duplicated constants

steps: Add FEAR_GREED_LOOKBACK_DAYS = 7 after line 84
Replace magic number 7 with constant at lines 209, 248, 278, 297, 593

tasks.description: Define cleanup retention constants in celery_schedules.py
steps: Add constants section after EXPIRY_* constants:
CLEANUP_LOGS_RETENTION_DAYS = 7
CLEANUP_TEMP_FILES_RETENTION_HOURS = 24
CLEANUP_NEWS_RETENTION_DAYS = 90
CLEANUP_AGENT_RUNS_RETENTION_DAYS = 30
CLEANUP_BACKUPS_KEEP_COUNT = 5
CLEANUP_MODELS_KEEP_COUNT = 3
CLEANUP_SOLUTION_STATE_RETENTION_DAYS = 14
Replace magic numbers at lines 593, 604, 626, 637, 658, 669, 681

tasks.description: Consolidate log level constants in status_logs.py
steps: Create LOG_LEVELS constant as single source of truth
Derive VALID_LEVELS from LOG_LEVEL_PRIORITY.keys()
Update set_log_level to reference LOG_LEVELS constant
Create single SERVICE_UNIT_MAPPING constant at module level
Reference in get_unified_logs instead of inline dict (line 477-484)

tasks.description: Extract hardcoded network config to centralized config
steps: Extract FRONTEND_HOST and BACKEND_HOST to backend/app/config.py or environment variables
Update sitemap_service.py, main.py, dev-companion/server.py, test_criteria_verifier.py
Use environment variable with fallback: os.getenv('FRONTEND_HOST', '192.168.8.233')

phases.name: Type Safety Improvements
phases.goal: Fix type annotation gaps and unsafe patterns

tasks.description: Update UnifiedLogEntry to Pydantic v2 pattern in status_logs.py
steps: Replace 'class Config: frozen = False' with 'model_config = ConfigDict(validate_assignment=True)'
Import ConfigDict from pydantic

tasks.description: Fix TypedDict access errors in reference_tasks.py
steps: Change ValuationMetricsDict access from metrics['key'] to metrics.get('key')
Fix lines 262-268 to use proper TypedDict access pattern

tasks.description: Add type check for payload in reference_tasks.py
steps: Add isinstance(payload, dict) check after json.loads in _process_cache_entries
Add debug log for non-dict payloads

tasks.description: Remove redundant type conversion in reference_tasks.py
steps: Remove lines 369-370 with redundant str() conversion after type guard
Pass symbol and source directly (type guard at line 336 already ensures strings)
Add 'self._message_sequence: dict[str, int] = {}' to __init__ method (after line 90)
Remove getattr calls at lines 727, 824
Replace with direct assignment

phases.name: Modularization
phases.goal: Extract large components into smaller, focused modules

tasks.description: Move SQL queries to MarketRepository in market.py
steps: Add methods to MarketRepository: get_fear_greed_history_data(), get_indicator_history_data(), get_corporate_actions(), get_corporate_actions_summary()
Move SQL logic from API endpoints to repository methods
Update endpoints to call repository methods instead of direct storage.connection()
Create PermissionRequestPanel.tsx with permission UI block (lines 460-487)
Props: { permission: PermissionRequest | null, onRespond: (allowed: boolean) => void }
Import and use in AgentPanel
Extract nested parse_float function (lines 155-161) to backend/app/utils/formatters.py
Function signature: def parse_float(value: Any) -> float | None
Import and use in _extract_valuation_metrics
Import calculate_sharpe_ratio from app.backtest.metrics
Remove _calculate_sharpe_ratio helper function (lines 286-304)
Adapt calling code in _calculate_rolling_metrics to match existing utility signature
Import calculate_max_drawdown from app.backtest.metrics
Remove _calculate_max_drawdown helper function (lines 306-326)
Create adapter function for data format conversion if needed

phases.name: Final Verification
phases.goal: Run full test suite and validate changes

steps: Run: pytest backend/tests/ -v --tb=short
Ensure all tests pass
Fix any regressions
Run: npm run lint --prefix frontend
Run: npm run build --prefix frontend
Ensure no errors
Run: mypy backend/app/ --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary
Ensure no new type errors introduced
